creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

We are sorry that we have left this uncommitted for so long, 
but due to the delay the distfile seems to have disappeared 
from the master site and I could only find a new version called 
emcws-20.7-20010622.gz.  Would you take a look at the new 
version and update your port? 

If you find the master site tends to remove old distribution 
files,  I'll put a copy of the file on my MASTER_SITE_LOCAL 
area.  Feel free to ask me to do that as necessary.  Thanks.
